subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim consumed hallucinogenic Underdark mushrooms.
source_quote: having consumed hallucinogenic Underdark mushrooms

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was found running naked through the fungus forest.
source_quote: running naked through the fungus forest

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party spent a few days of rest in Sporedome.
source_quote: The party enjoys a few days of rest in Sporedome

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim lectured the party on the unfathomable consequences of thievery.
source_quote: Bramgrim lectures the party on the unfathomable consequences of thievery

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used his artificer skills to construct a specialized distillery for refining Underdark mushrooms.
source_quote: Felkur uses his artificer skills to construct a specialized distillery for refining Underdark mushrooms

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas assisted Felkur in refining distillation techniques.
source_quote: Akritas assists Felkur in refining distillation techniques

subject: Daein
fact: Daein explored business opportunities for selling soups and other goods.
source_quote: Daein explores business opportunities for selling soups and other goods

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim spent time communing with nature in the fungus forest.
source_quote: Bramgrim spends time communing with nature in the fungus forest

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was occasionally under the influence of hallucinogenic mushrooms.
source_quote: occasionally under the influence of hallucinogenic mushrooms

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: A messenger from the Emerald Enclave arrived to inform Akritas of an urgent mission.
source_quote: A messenger from the Emerald Enclave arrives to inform Akritas of an urgent mission

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave requested the party's assistance regarding the situation in Maerimydra.
source_quote: the Emerald Enclave... have requested their assistance

subject: Harpers
fact: The Harpers requested the party's assistance regarding the situation in Maerimydra.
source_quote: Harpers... have requested their assistance

subject: Lords' Alliance
fact: The Lords' Alliance requested the party's assistance regarding the situation in Maerimydra.
source_quote: Lords' Alliance... have requested their assistance

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Order of the Gauntlet requested the party's assistance regarding the situation in Maerimydra.
source_quote: Order of the Gauntlet have requested their assistance

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas revealed her rank within the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: Akritas reveals her rank within the Emerald Enclave

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas receives the ability to request scouts and purchase specialized scrolls and potions as a benefit of her rank.
source_quote: the ability to request scouts and purchase specialized scrolls and potions

subject: mission agreement
fact: The party agreed to attend a meeting to hear more about the threat involving Maerimydra.
source_quote: The party agrees to attend a meeting to hear more about the threat involving Maerimydra

subject: hollowed-out mushroom dwelling
fact: The party entered a hollowed-out mushroom dwelling to meet a representative arranged by the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: The party enters a hollowed-out mushroom dwelling to meet a representative arranged by the Emerald Enclave

subject: Glor
fact: Glor is a cowled figure who greets the party telepathically.
source_quote: A cowled figure named Glor greets them telepathically

subject: Glor
fact: Glor revealed himself to be a Mind Flayer from the Ryxyg encampment.
source_quote: revealing himself to be a Mind Flayer from the Ryxyg encampment

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim confronted Glor about the history of illithid slavery.
source_quote: Bramgrim confronts Glor about the history of illithid slavery

subject: Glor
fact: Glor claimed his community seeks peaceful cohabitation with other species.
source_quote: Glor claims his community seeks peaceful cohabitation with other species

subject: giants of Maerimydra
fact: The giants of Maerimydra have built devastating arcane siege weapons intended for use against the surface world.
source_quote: the giants of Maerimydra have built devastating arcane siege weapons intended for use against the surface world

subject: Glor's proposition
fact: Glor offered information on how to disable the war engines without the perpetrators being identified, in exchange for a task the party must perform.
source_quote: Glor offers information on how to disable these war engines without the perpetrators being identified, in exchange for a task the party must perform

subject: Daein
fact: Daein stated his life goal is to want FU money.
source_quote: I want FU money

subject: Daein
fact: Daein delivered a cold, credible threat to Glor warning that if the promised intelligence proves false there will be consequences for the Ryxyg colony.
source_quote: Daein delivers a cold, credible threat to Glor — warning the mind flayer that if the promised intelligence proves false, there will be consequences for the Ryxyg colony

subject: Glor
fact: Glor took the party seriously for the first time after Daein's warning.
source_quote: for the first time, Glor takes the party seriously

subject: rogue's lair
fact: The party discovered that the arcanely locked door in the rogue's lair can only be opened by placing a brain into a basin carved in the shape of the underside of a human skull.
source_quote: The party discovers that the arcanely locked door in the rogue's lair can only be opened by placing a brain into a basin carved in the shape of the underside of a human skull

subject: stone basin
fact: The party found a macabre stone basin carved in the shape of the underside of a human skull.
source_quote: macabre stone basin

subject: brainless corpses
fact: The party found four brainless corpses.
source_quote: finding four brainless corpses

subject: Arrizz
fact: The party heard the unmistakable voice of Arrizz, a drow from their past, shouting defiant insults in Undercommon from behind a locked door.
source_quote: The party hears the unmistakable voice of Arrizz, a drow from their past, shouting defiant insults in Undercommon from behind a locked door

subject: locked door in the rogue mind flayer's lair
fact: Arrizz was shouting from behind a locked door deep inside the rogue mind flayer's lair.
source_quote: behind a locked door deep inside the rogue mind flayer's lair

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas realized that the party missed a golden intelligence opportunity by not reading the ledger during their previous heist.
source_quote: we could have looked in the ledger

subject: missed ledger opportunity
fact: The party missed an opportunity to read or steal a ledger during their previous exploits.
source_quote: missed a golden intelligence opportunity by not reading the ledger

subject: Ryxyg colony
fact: The Ryxyg colony is a mind flayer encampment mentioned by Glor.
source_quote: Mind Flayer from the Ryxyg encampment
